actions.text: Amendment SA 5812 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5812, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 52 - 47. Record Vote Number: 159.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(d) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5812.
Amendment SA 5812 proposed by Senator Cassidy to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5812 proposed by Senator Cassidy to Amendment SA 5453.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5812, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 52 - 47. Record Vote Number: 159.

amends_amendment.purpose: In the nature of a substitute.

purpose: To provide compensation to law enforcement officers who defended the United States Capitol during the events that occurred at or near the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021, and for other purposes.
